examples: He was born of Anglo-American parentage.
The difference is, you are Anglo-Saxons, we are Latins.

As far as comparison goes, Anglo is trading at a premium next to its peers.
Shell aims to combine coal gasification with gas-to-diesel technology in an alliance with coal miner Anglo American.
